overview: I built a PM Knowledge Assistant using ChromaDB and Claude, implementing a full RAG pipeline that grounds responses in my documents. RAG produced specific Q3 data (2.3% lift) vs. generic benchmarks without it.

keyPoints.title: Python 3.14 broke ChromaDB; had to downgrade to 3.12
Cosine similarity: A/B scored 0.41 vs. A/C at 0.14
RAG returned specific 2.3% lift; without it, generic 5–15%
Re-ranking with Haiku correctly pruned irrelevant chunks by query
System prompt guardrails — not RAG alone — prevent hallucination
